data.content: Implementation review rejected: rollback.rs regression. Commit 98f66e2 correctly added ready_to_evaluate recognition to is_queue_state via workflow_runtime::READY_TO_EVALUATE constant and included a test, but this change was lost (likely during the 3bf936c merge which only carried forward the state_hierarchy.rs fixes). The is_queue_state function at src/rollback.rs:110 still only checks starts_with("ready_for_"), violating the requirement to remove hardcoded ready_for_* assumptions. Fix: re-apply the rollback.rs portion of 98f66e2 (add workflow_runtime import, update is_queue_state, restore the test).
